MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Almaroof Apatira & Jinky Canete for plaintiff Convalescent Center Mission St. Inc.
Charles Zubrzycki, defendant

This cause, having been assigned from Department 206, comes on calendar this day for Small Claims Trial.

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Plaintiff's exhibits retained. There are no exhibits submitted by the defendant.

Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (604)
